narrative: Hopes for an imminent end to the US-Iran war drive a sharp dollar sell-off as geopolitical risk premiums unwind — DXY -0.44% to a 2.5-month low; gold higher +0.20%; equities +1.46%; VIX 17.4. USD/JPY retreats to 156.34 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry bid softens on the risk-on shift. NZD/CAD emerges as the week's dominant G8 theme (spread 1.164%) as NZD 1W avg (+0.590%, n=4) outperforms CAD 1W avg (-0.574%, n=3). Watch RBNZ Rate Decision on May 27 for the next high-impact policy catalyst.
